final_prompt.prompt:
Use case: infographic-diagram
Asset type: medical education illustration, educational poster
Primary request: 3D medical illustration of human cardiovascular system with cross-sectional heart anatomy
Scene/backdrop: dark gradient background, anatomical diagram layout with label space reserved
Subject: human heart cut open showing four chambers (left/right atrium, left/right ventricle), valve positions and morphology, aorta, pulmonary artery, superior/inferior vena cava
Style/medium: highly realistic medical illustration, Netter-style anatomical accuracy combined with modern 3D rendering
Composition/framing: centered anatomical view, clear cross-sectional perspective showing internal structures
Lighting/mood: clinical studio lighting, dramatic rim lighting to highlight anatomical details
Color palette: arterial system vivid red, venous system deep blue, coronary arteries highlighted in gold, dark background
Materials/textures: realistic myocardial fiber texture visible, smooth vessel surfaces, 3D rendered anatomical precision
Text (verbatim): "标注文字预留空间"
Constraints: preserve Netter medical illustration accuracy, show blood flow direction with arrows and dynamic light effects, coronary artery paths highlighted in gold on heart surface
Avoid: cartoonish simplification, inaccurate anatomy, cluttered composition, distracting background elements, watermark
